message:
test(proptest): expand proptest_webhook (14→30) and proptest_tantivy_reindex (15→29) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

webhook: add DeliveryResult constructor invariants (ok/err accepted/error),
endpoint config with headers serde roundtrip, wildcard matching, multi-event
matching, render_template summary presence for all templates, object type
check, and Slack suppressed count.

tantivy_reindex: add BackfillRange single-point tests, boundary inclusivity
for TimeRange, excludes-below-start, past_end boundary tests, variant tag
checks, field presence checks, and ReindexProgress max/zero/None roundtrips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
